What We Treat
Complete Pest Control Solutions
From cockroaches to termites — residential and commercial, done right the first time.
🪳

Cockroach Control

Gel-based and spray treatment for kitchens, bathrooms, and drains. Fast-acting and completely odour-free.

Most Popular
🪵

Termite Treatment

Pre- and post-construction termite control with soil treatment and bait systems for lasting protection.

10-Year Warranty
🦟

Mosquito & Fly Control

Fogging, larvicide, and ULV spray to completely break the breeding cycle and keep your space bite-free.

Seasonal Special
🐀

Rodent Control

Baiting stations and exclusion techniques to eliminate rats and mice from homes and commercial spaces.

Commercial Ready
🐜

Bed Bug & Ant Control

Targeted heat and chemical treatment for bed bugs, ants, ticks, and fleas. Completely safe for children.

Child Safe
🏢

Commercial AMC

Annual Maintenance Contracts for offices, hotels, restaurants, and warehouses. Fully custom plans available.

Custom Plans
Meet The Expert
Led by Mr. M Kumar
Founder, certified professional, and the face behind every successful treatment.

Mr. M Kumar

Founder & Director · Hitech Pest Control Services, Hyderabad

With over 15 years of hands-on experience in urban pest management, Mr. M Kumar has built Hitech Pest Control into one of Hyderabad's most trusted pest control services — earning a perfect 5.0 Google rating across 125+ reviews.

He is a certified professional recognised by the Pest Control Association of India and personally trained by the National Institute of Plant Health Management (NIPHM), under the Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India.

His commitment to safe, WHO-approved chemicals and guaranteed results makes Hitech the go-to choice for homes, restaurants, offices, and housing societies across Hyderabad.

🏅 NIPHM Certified 🇮🇳 Govt. of India Trained 🔬 15+ Years Experience ⭐ 5.0 Google Rated
Credentials & Recognition
Certified. Recognised. Trusted.
Our certifications prove our commitment to professional, safe, and effective pest control.

🏆 Pest Control Association of India

Recognised at the National Symposium on "New Avenues in Pest Management" — University of Mysore, organised by PCAI & UPL.

May 2022

🎓 NIPHM — Ministry of Agriculture, Govt. of India

Completed Level I Training Programme on Urban Pest Management for Technicians at NIPHM, Rajendranagar, Hyderabad.

November 2023

📜 Official NIPHM Government Certificate

Certificate No. 892 — Signed by the Director General of NIPHM, confirming Mr. M Kumar's successful completion. Govt. of India issued.

Certificate No. 892 · 2023–24
Simple Process
Done in 4 Easy Steps
Completely hassle-free — from booking to a pest-free home or office.
01

Call or Book

Call 098851 80118 or fill the form. We respond within the hour.

02

Free Inspection

Our certified technician visits and recommends the right treatment plan.

03

Safe Treatment

WHO-approved, odour-free chemicals. Family and pets stay safe throughout.

04

Guaranteed Results

Pests return within warranty? We come back — completely free of charge.
